    A

    ANONYMOUS_USER - Static variable in record class com.embabel.examples.ragbot.javelit.JavelitChatUI
    Synthetic user used for browser-based chat sessions when no real identity is available.
    app() - Method in record class com.embabel.examples.ragbot.javelit.JavelitChatUI
    Entry point for each HTTP interaction handled by Javelit.

    C

    ChatActions - Class in com.embabel.examples.ragbot
    Defines chat-focused Embabel actions that the utility chatbot can invoke.
    ChatActions(SearchOperations, RagbotProperties) - Constructor for class com.embabel.examples.ragbot.ChatActions
    Creates action handlers and wires retrieval capabilities.
    chatbot - Variable in record class com.embabel.examples.ragbot.javelit.JavelitChatUI
    The field for the chatbot record component.
    chatbot() - Method in record class com.embabel.examples.ragbot.javelit.JavelitChatUI
    Returns the value of the chatbot record component.
    chatbot(AgentPlatform) - Method in class com.embabel.examples.ragbot.ChatConfiguration
    Builds a chatbot backed by the shared AgentPlatform.
    ChatConfiguration - Class in com.embabel.examples.ragbot
    Configures the chatbot facade used by shell and web UI.
    ChatConfiguration() - Constructor for class com.embabel.examples.ragbot.ChatConfiguration
    Creates the chat configuration bean container.
    chatLlm - Variable in record class com.embabel.examples.ragbot.RagbotProperties
    The field for the chatLlm record component.
    chatLlm() - Method in record class com.embabel.examples.ragbot.RagbotProperties
    Returns the value of the chatLlm record component.
    chunkerConfig - Variable in record class com.embabel.examples.ragbot.RagbotProperties
    The field for the chunkerConfig record component.
    chunkerConfig() - Method in record class com.embabel.examples.ragbot.RagbotProperties
    Returns the value of the chunkerConfig record component.
    chunks() - Method in record class com.embabel.examples.ragbot.RagbotShell
    Prints all chunks and metadata currently stored in the index.
    com.embabel.examples.ragbot - package com.embabel.examples.ragbot
     
    com.embabel.examples.ragbot.javelit - package com.embabel.examples.ragbot.javelit
     
    contentElements() - Method in record class com.embabel.examples.ragbot.RagbotShell
    Prints all indexed ContentElement instances.

    D

    doApp() - Method in record class com.embabel.examples.ragbot.javelit.JavelitChatUI
    Renders the chat page and processes user input for the current browser session.

    I

    info() - Method in record class com.embabel.examples.ragbot.RagbotShell
    Shows high-level diagnostics for the Lucene store.
    ingest(String) - Method in record class com.embabel.examples.ragbot.RagbotShell
    Ingests a single URL or file into the RAG store.
    ingestDirectory(String) - Method in record class com.embabel.examples.ragbot.RagbotShell
    Ingests all files in a local directory into the RAG store.

    Indicates whether the UI server is currently running.

    javelitChatUI - Variable in record class com.embabel.examples.ragbot.javelit.JavelitShell

    Returns the value of the javelitChatUI record component.

    Provides a Javelit-based web UI for the RAG chatbot.

    OutputChannel that queues assistant messages for retrieval.
    JavelitShell - Record Class in com.embabel.examples.ragbot.javelit
    Exposes Spring Shell commands for controlling the Javelit browser chat interface.

    Creates an instance of a JavelitShell record class.

    R

    RagbotApplication - Class in com.embabel.examples.ragbot
    Bootstraps the Ragbot learning application.

    Creates the application bootstrap class.
    RagbotProperties - Record Class in com.embabel.examples.ragbot
    Holds externalized configuration for the Ragbot application.

    Creates an instance of a RagbotProperties record class.
    RagbotProperties.Voice - Record Class in com.embabel.examples.ragbot
    Voice/persona settings that control response style.
    RagbotShell - Record Class in com.embabel.examples.ragbot
    Exposes Spring Shell commands for ingestion, inspection, and maintenance of the local RAG store.
    RagbotShell(LuceneSearchOperations) - Constructor for record class com.embabel.examples.ragbot.RagbotShell
    Creates an instance of a RagbotShell record class.
    RagConfiguration - Class in com.embabel.examples.ragbot
    Configures retrieval infrastructure used by the chatbot.
    RagConfiguration() - Constructor for class com.embabel.examples.ragbot.RagConfiguration
    Creates the retrieval configuration bean container.
    resolveCssPath() - Method in record class com.embabel.examples.ragbot.javelit.JavelitChatUI
    Resolves configured CSS resource to a filesystem path for Javelit's headers file.
    respond(Conversation, ActionContext) - Method in class com.embabel.examples.ragbot.ChatActions
    Responds to an incoming user message using the configured LLM and RAG reference.

    S

    searchOperations - Variable in record class com.embabel.examples.ragbot.javelit.JavelitChatUI
    The field for the searchOperations record component.

    Returns the value of the searchOperations record component.
    sections() - Method in record class com.embabel.examples.ragbot.RagbotShell
    Prints all indexed Section records.
    send(OutputChannelEvent) - Method in record class com.embabel.examples.ragbot.javelit.JavelitChatUI.QueueingOutputChannel
    Handles output events and enqueues assistant messages for later rendering.
    serverRef - Static variable in record class com.embabel.examples.ragbot.javelit.JavelitChatUI
    Singleton reference to the running embedded server, if started.
    start() - Method in record class com.embabel.examples.ragbot.javelit.JavelitChatUI
    Starts the UI on the configured port and opens the browser.
    start(boolean) - Method in record class com.embabel.examples.ragbot.javelit.JavelitChatUI
    Starts the web chat UI using the configured default port.
    start(int) - Method in record class com.embabel.examples.ragbot.javelit.JavelitChatUI
    Starts the web chat UI on a specific port and opens a browser window.
    start(int, boolean) - Method in record class com.embabel.examples.ragbot.javelit.JavelitChatUI
    Starts the web chat UI with explicit control over port and browser behavior.
    stop() - Method in record class com.embabel.examples.ragbot.javelit.JavelitChatUI
    Stops the running UI server if one exists.
